final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of Korean café-style fashionable coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotations overlaid on every element, styled for an Instagram Story post — no people.

Style/medium: smartphone-shot editorial food photography with the warm intimacy of a Seoul café Instagram feed, overlaid with hand-drawn white-pen sketch annotations in a one-stroke, slightly uneven line style — rough like a personal diary page, in the spirit of Japanese magazine scrapbook notes
Composition: flat-lay or slight overhead angle, generous breathing room between items, annotations distributed around the frame with arrows and dotted lines guiding the eye from element to element — negative space preserved so the sketch layer never crowds the scene
Subject: a beautifully styled coffee drink (latte art or dalgona-style) and at least one dessert (e.g. financier, cream-filled pastry, or fruit tart) arranged on a café table; each element traced with a loose white outline following its outer silhouette, with a short handwritten Japanese annotation attached by arrow or dashed line; decorative accents — steam wisps above the drink, small sparkle marks (✦ ☆), a tiny heart, a small emoji-like face — added sparingly
Scene/backdrop: Korean café interior surface — matte ceramic plate, linen napkin, warm wooden table, soft natural window light
Lighting/mood: the quiet warmth of a slow weekend morning, diffused window light casting no hard shadows, a mood of gentle self-indulgence and unhurried pleasure
Color palette: warm cream and caramel tones anchoring the scene, the white annotation lines floating above, a whisper of dusty rose or sage from the ceramics
Materials/textures: matte ceramic glaze, soft linen weave, the slight imperfection of hand-drawn white pen lines — not digital-clean, slightly pressure-varied
Text (verbatim): hand-drawn Japanese annotations in hiragana (7 parts) and simple kanji (3 parts), short diary-voice phrases per element —
  • coffee drink → e.g. 「やさしい甘さ☕」with steam wisp above
  • dessert → e.g. 「しっとり、最高…✦」with dashed outline tracing the pastry
  • space/atmosphere → e.g. 「ゆったりした時間」with a small arrow pointing to the background
  • overall one-liner → e.g. 「しあわせすぎた〜♡」placed in a corner with a tiny heart
Constraints: no people or hands visible; white pen lines must follow object outlines (not float randomly); annotations stay short and diary-like; decorative accents (steam, sparkles, hearts) used sparingly with breathing room preserved
Avoid: overcrowded annotation layer, digital-clean vector lines, overly symmetrical composition, dark moody lighting, English text, excessive emoji stacking
